UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The World card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The World card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The World card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The World card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The World card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The World card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the balance, joy, and integration of Gaia as she dances with the beasts, symbolizing unity and completion.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the nudity or sexuality of the image, instead focus on the cosmic backdrop and the overall sense of wholeness.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the The World card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, brass, triumphant, majestic, uplifting, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The World card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The World card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the endless voyage, the ghostly captain, and the cursed crew toiling without hope of land or closure.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the stormy sea as it is merely a backdrop for the eternal journey.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the The World card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, reversed, introspective, melancholic, minor, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The World card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The World card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the moment of homecoming, Odysseus's embrace with Penelope, and the culmination of his long journey.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the hardships endured during the journey, instead focus on the joy and relief of finally returning home.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the The World card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, uilleann pipes, ethereal, triumphant, majestic, instrumental
